summary.zh-CN: 会话排队、技能预览、长会话滚动和 Remote 断线恢复更加稳定。
summary.en-US: Queued messages, skill previews, long-chat scrolling, and Remote reconnects are now more reliable.

title.en-US: Queued messages are scoped to each session

body.zh-CN: 回复期间继续发送的消息会按顺序执行，切换会话或刷新后仍可查看、编辑和删除。
body.en-US: Messages sent during a reply run in order and remain available to view, edit, or delete after navigation or refresh.

title.en-US: Skill references open directly in preview

body.zh-CN: 聊天消息会保留技能名称、来源和文件路径，点击后可打开对应的 SKILL.md。
body.en-US: Chat messages retain skill names, sources, and file paths so the matching SKILL.md can be opened directly.

title.zh-CN: 长会话滚动位置更稳定
title.en-US: More stable scrolling in long chats

body.zh-CN: 异步内容改变高度或加载历史消息时，当前阅读位置不会被意外拉动。
body.en-US: Asynchronous content and history loading no longer pull the current reading position unexpectedly.

body.zh-CN: Remote 异常断开后会从基础延迟重新连接，多个本地进程并存时也会显示真实连接 owner 的状态。
body.en-US: Remote restarts its retry cycle after an unexpected disconnect and reports status from the process that owns the connection.

body.zh-CN: 现有 NPM 安装可以直接通过 stable 通道升级；会话、配置和 Remote 域名保持不变。
body.en-US: Existing npm installations can update through the stable channel while sessions, configuration, and Remote domains remain unchanged.
